jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at BLK-Max Hospital
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BLK-Max Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About BLK-Max Hospital:
BLK-Max Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BLK-Max Hospital!
